examples: He choked on a soya bean and died suddenly.
Their supposedly clean, green fuel has been gobbling up some of the choicest food crops, including corn, rape, and soya.
Most breads, if they are not wheat flour, tend to be soya flour.
Grain and soya are the company's biggest costs in terms of feed for the chickens.
Richard is a pig farmer and feeds his stock on pellets which contain 20% soya.
